metadata.description: PAEC GND corpus — Ground control training pairs. Phases: ground, taxi, pushback, holding, crossing, lineup. v3.1 adds 60 real PAEC12 examples from GROUND.pdf corpus.

corpus.atc: tower one one eight one, good day
corpus.pilot: One one eight one, good day, Airphil two one three one
corpus.explanation: PAEC12: Tower frequency readback correct — frequency confirmed with callsign.

corpus.atc: tower one one eight one, good day
corpus.pilot: Contact one two one seven, thank you, good day, RPC eight seven eight six
corpus.explanation: PAEC12: Wrong frequency read back — pilot said one two one seven instead of one one eight one.

corpus.atc: contact tower, one one eight one
corpus.pilot: One one eight one, Airphil two zero three niner, good day
corpus.explanation: PAEC12: Tower handoff frequency correctly read back with callsign.

corpus.atc: when ready, tower one one eight one, good day
corpus.pilot: When ready, one one eight one, good day, Cebu seven zero three
corpus.explanation: PAEC12: Complete tower handoff readback including timing qualifier — correct.

corpus.atc: tower one one eight one, good day
corpus.pilot: Tower one one eight one, thank you, good day, Coolred three one seven
corpus.explanation: PAEC12: 'Thank you' is non-standard in a frequency handoff readback — use only the frequency and callsign.

corpus.atc: cross runway three one, hold short of golf eight echo
corpus.pilot: Cross runway three one, hold short of golf eight echo, RPC eight seven eight six
corpus.explanation: PAEC12: Runway crossing with hold short point read back completely — correct.

corpus.atc: right on foxtrot four, cross runway three one, papa kilo
corpus.pilot: Right on foxtrot four, cross three one, papa, hold short kilo, RPC eight six one three
corpus.explanation: PAEC12: 'Runway' dropped before three one in readback. 'Hold short kilo' added — not in original instruction.

corpus.atc: tow Mike two, Charlie, hold short of November
corpus.pilot: Tow Charlie, hold short of November, RPC eight seven eight six
corpus.explanation: PAEC12: Starting point 'Mike two' omitted from towing readback — full route must be confirmed.

corpus.atc: tow golf one-one, delta, hold short of foxtrot four
corpus.pilot: Golf one-one, delta, hold short of foxtrot four, RPC eight-six one-three
corpus.explanation: PAEC12: Towing instruction read back — route and hold short confirmed with callsign.

corpus.atc: hold at Sierra nine, for sequence tower one one eight one, good day
corpus.pilot: Sierra nine, sequence one one eight one, Coolred two one five
corpus.explanation: PAEC12: 'Hold at' omitted — instruction was to hold at Sierra nine. 'For sequence' meaning may be misunderstood.

corpus.atc: hold at November five, traffic Cebu will taxi November
corpus.pilot: Hold at November five, Coolred one two six four
corpus.explanation: PAEC12: Hold position correctly read back — traffic advisory acknowledged implicitly.

corpus.atc: continue Delta, hold short Charlie
corpus.pilot: Continue taxi Delta, hold short Charlie, Cebu five eight five
corpus.explanation: PAEC12: Taxi continuation and hold short confirmed with callsign — 'taxi' clarifier acceptable.

corpus.atc: continue Delta
corpus.pilot: Cebu four eight five, hold short of Foxtrot five
corpus.explanation: PAEC12: Pilot read back the wrong instruction — responded with hold short rather than confirming continue Delta.

corpus.atc: startup approved, one two three two five for air taxi
corpus.pilot: Startup approved and one two three two five for air taxi, thank you and good day, seven four five eight
corpus.explanation: PAEC12: 'Thank you and good day' inappropriate during active clearance readback — callsign as number only ('seven four five eight') without full registration is non-standard.

corpus.atc: standby for start runway zero six, number two
corpus.pilot: Standing by, China Southern three zero seven eight
corpus.explanation: PAEC12: Standby acknowledged correctly — sequence number noted, callsign confirmed.

corpus.atc: standby taxi, traffic on Charlie
corpus.pilot: Standby taxi, Coolred seven eight one
corpus.explanation: PAEC12: Standby instruction read back correctly with callsign.

corpus.atc: expect about twenty to thirty minutes before your start-up, Currently there are eleven aircraft with start-up parameters
corpus.explanation: PAEC12: 'Roger' acceptable for information-only transmissions — no readback of specific clearance elements required.

corpus.atc: startup approved, runway zero six, for pushback contact one two eight eight, Airphil two eight four nine
corpus.pilot: Startup approved, for pushback contact one two eight eight, Airphil two eight four niner
corpus.explanation: PAEC12: Runway omitted from startup readback — runway designation is safety-critical and must be confirmed.

corpus.atc: startup approved, for your request contact one two three two five
corpus.pilot: Startup approved, contact one two three two five, Helicopter five eight five
corpus.explanation: PAEC12: Startup and frequency read back correctly — callsign confirmed.

corpus.atc: taxi Golf one one, Delta, hold short of Foxtrot four
corpus.pilot: Ground, Cebu six two three Hold short Golf one one, request taxi to runway three one, good morning
corpus.explanation: PAEC12: Pilot transmitted a new request instead of reading back the taxi instruction — ATC clearance must be acknowledged first.

corpus.atc: your flight plan is saved and startup approved, one two three two five for air taxi
corpus.pilot: Startup approved and one two three two five for air taxi, thank you and good day, seven four five eight
corpus.explanation: PAEC12: Non-standard social phrases during clearance readback. Callsign must use full registration, not just numbers.

corpus.atc: startup approved runway zero six, for pushback contact one two one three five
corpus.pilot: Startup approved runway zero six, for pushback one two one three five, CoolRed one eight eight
corpus.explanation: PAEC12: Complete startup readback — runway and pushback frequency both confirmed with callsign.

corpus.atc: cebu niner one niner, taxi Golf one one delta, hold short of Foxtrot four
corpus.pilot: Golf one one Delta Fox four, Cebu niner one niner
corpus.explanation: PAEC12: 'Taxi' omitted; hold short abbreviated as 'Fox four' — full instruction must be read back per ICAO.

corpus.atc: for sequence tower one one eight one, good day
corpus.pilot: One one eight one, thank you, good day, Coolred three one seven
corpus.explanation: PAEC12: 'Thank you' is non-standard in ATC communication readbacks — omit social phrases.

corpus.atc: for sequence tower one one eight one, good day
corpus.pilot: Tower one one eight one, good day, Cebu eight niner one
corpus.explanation: PAEC12: Tower frequency and sequence instruction confirmed — correct readback with callsign.

corpus.atc: ramp one two eight eight, good day
corpus.pilot: Papa hold short Kilo, contact one two eight decimal eight, thank you and good day, RPC eight six one three
corpus.explanation: PAEC12: Pilot added unrequested 'Papa hold short Kilo' and non-standard 'thank you and good day' — only confirm the instruction given.

corpus.atc: hold short Golf one two
corpus.pilot: Cebu four eight five, hold short of Golf one two
corpus.explanation: PAEC12: Hold short correctly confirmed — callsign placed at start is acceptable.

corpus.atc: taxi Golf one four delta, hold short of Foxtrot five
corpus.pilot: Golf one four Delta, hold short of Foxtrot five, following company, Cebu eight niner one
corpus.explanation: PAEC12: Taxi route and hold short confirmed — pilot added traffic awareness info, acceptable.

corpus.atc: startup approved, runway three one, for pushback ramp one two one three five
corpus.pilot: Startup approved, for push one two one three five, thank you, Coolred one two six four
corpus.explanation: PAEC12: Runway three one omitted from readback; 'thank you' non-standard in ATC communications.
